title: Controller - How Do I?
description:
Controller - How Do I?

Controller - How Do I...?

How do I backup and restore my controller settings?

To backup the current controller settings:

	Select Controller
	 from the Tools menu.
	Click the Backup
	 Controller button.

To restore controller settings:

	Select Controller
	 from the Tools menu.
	Click the Restore
	 Controller button.

How do I view controller error history?

Select System History from the View menu to view controller errors, events, and warnings.

How do I save and view controller status?

You can save the current controller status and send the information to Epson technical support when requested to do so.
  You can save the current status of the controller using one of two methods:

	Insert a USB key into the USB device connector
	 on the controller.  Then press the TRIG button to save the status
	 on the USB key.
	Select Controller from the Tools menu, then
	 select Export Controller Status.  Choose the folder where you
	 want to save the status information.

To view controller status data:

	Select Controller from the Tools menu, then
	 click the View Controller Status
	 button.
	Navigate to the status folder and click OK.
